label: Splash
summary: A click-to-enter intro sheet, hidden until its enhancer decides to show it; the page never depends on it.
era: The click-to-enter splash page: a huge title, an [ ENTER ] link, and a webmaster certain you would wait.

classes.name: rs-splash
classes.role: full-viewport click-to-enter sheet; hidden until the enhancer reveals it

a11y: A native <dialog aria-label="Welcome"> with an autofocused Enter button; the page behind stays in the DOM and is never hidden from assistive tech.
